stemHtml: Approaching to land with a receiver failure, you continue as planned for RWY 27, descending from 6000 to 2000 ft. Your blind transmission should end with...

options.a: NEXT REPORT FINAL RWY 27, ALL STATIONS RECEIVING RADIO CHECK.
options.b: HEADING 270, CONTINUING FLIGHT AS PER FLIGHT PLAN.
options.c: NEXT REPORT FINAL RWY 27, HEADING 270, CONTINUING FLIGHT AS PLANNED.
options.d: NEXT REPORT AT TIME 1201, ALL STATIONS RECEIVING RADIO CHECK.
